# @021.is/spine-testing — LLM usage

> Shared test helpers: worker-shared Testcontainers Postgres + Prisma migrator, in-process JWKS mock server, MSW factory, and deterministic time/ids.

Install (dev): bun add -d @021.is/spine-testing

## Imports
- `import { startSharedPostgres, runPrismaMigrate, truncateAll } from "@021.is/spine-testing/postgres"`
- `import { startJwksMockServer } from "@021.is/spine-testing/jwks"`
- `import { startMockServer, http, HttpResponse } from "@021.is/spine-testing/msw"`
- `import { freezeTime, deterministicIds } from "@021.is/spine-testing/time"`
- (root `@021.is/spine-testing` re-exports all of the above)

## API
`./postgres`:
- `startSharedPostgres(opts?)` — one Postgres container per Vitest worker (idempotent); returns the connection URL. `stopSharedPostgres()` to stop
- `runPrismaMigrate(url, { mode?: "deploy" | "push", schemaPath?, prismaBin? })` — apply schema
- `truncateAll(url, { exclude? })` — truncate all public tables between tests (skips `_prisma_migrations`)

`./jwks`:
- `startJwksMockServer({ keyId? })` — serves `/.well-known/jwks.json`; returns `JwksMockServer` (`{ url, keyId, publicJwk, signToken(claims, opts?), stop() }`)

`./msw`:
- `startMockServer(handlers?)` — returns `MockServer` (`{ server, useHandlers, reset, stop }`); re-exports `http`, `HttpResponse`

`./time`:
- `freezeTime(initial)` — `FrozenClock` (`now/advance/set/restore`); `deterministicIds(prefix?)` — `id_0001`, ...

## Example
```ts
import { beforeAll, afterEach } from "vitest";
import { startSharedPostgres, runPrismaMigrate, truncateAll } from "@021.is/spine-testing/postgres";

let dbUrl: string;
beforeAll(async () => {
  dbUrl = await startSharedPostgres();
  process.env.DATABASE_URL = dbUrl;
  await runPrismaMigrate(dbUrl, { mode: "push" });
}, 60_000);
afterEach(() => truncateAll(dbUrl));
```

## Notes
- Postgres helpers need Docker (Testcontainers). One shared container per worker; migrate once, `truncateAll` between tests.
- Deps bundled: `testcontainers`, `@testcontainers/postgresql`, `pg`, `jose`, `msw`. `freezeTime` uses Vitest fake timers.
